## Summary

Describe the user-facing value of this change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CTEM model or seeded data
- [ ] Tests or CI

## Safety and realism

- [ ] Fictional data remains fictional.
- [ ] No offensive automation or unauthorized testing guidance was added.
- [ ] CTEM claims are explainable and evidence-based.

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests pass.
- [ ] Frontend lint passes.
- [ ] Frontend build passes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed.
